raw_cv_text:
Fatemah de Jonge
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: fatemah.dejonge@outlook.com | LinkedIn: fatemah-de jonge | GitHub: Fatemahde Jonge | https://fatemah-
frontend.dev
EDUCATION
University of Cambridge | MSc Computer Science (Specialisation in Human-Computer Interaction) 2014 - 2015
Achieved Distinction grade in thesis on responsive UI patterns, resulting in 2 published papers in HCI conferences
Led departmental web development initiative, improving lab website accessibility scores from 42 to 94 WCAG
compliance
ETH Zurich | BSc Computer Science 2010 - 2013
Graduated with honors (top 12% of cohort) with focus on web technologies and interactive systems
Co-founded ETH Web Collective, growing the community to 450+ active members across 3 years
EXPERIENCE
Figma | Staff Frontend Engineer 2021 - Present
Architected and shipped responsive design system component library reducing implementation time by 62% across 40+
product teams
Led migration of legacy Vue.js rendering engine to React with WebGL optimization, improving canvas performance by
3.2x and increasing collaboration features adoption by 47%
Mentored 6 junior engineers and led weekly frontend architecture reviews, establishing coding standards that reduced bug
escape rate by 41%
Stripe | Senior Frontend Engineer 2018 - 2021
Designed and implemented payment forms abstraction layer in TypeScript/React, reducing PCI compliance
implementation time from 8 weeks to 2 weeks for 120+ merchants
Optimized critical checkout flow reducing bundle size by 45% and First Contentful Paint by 2.1s, increasing conversion
rate by 8.3%
Established frontend testing infrastructure and metrics dashboard, achieving 94% code coverage across codebase and
reducing production incidents by 56%
Datadog | Senior Frontend Engineer 2015 - 2018
Built real-time dashboard visualization engine handling 50K+ metrics updates/second using Vue.js and WebSockets,
supporting 2000+ enterprise customers
Implemented advanced filtering and query syntax UI (similar to SQL), improving customer query construction time by
68% and reducing support tickets by 34%
Drove adoption of TypeScript across 25 frontend services (500K+ lines of code), reducing runtime errors by 72% and
improving developer productivity by 38%
Shopify | Frontend Engineer 2013 - 2015
Developed responsive admin dashboard v2 in React and SCSS, shipped to 800K+ merchants and processing $80B+ in
annual GMV
Optimized image uploads pipeline reducing average upload time from 12s to 1.8s (86% improvement) by implementing
lazy loading and CDN edge optimization
Collaborated with design team to build Polaris design system MVP with 45 reusable components, standardizing UX
across 12 product teams
PROJECTS
ChromaFlow - Advanced Color Palette Generator | React 18, TypeScript, Three.js, TailwindCSS, Node.js 2022 - 2023
Built AI-powered color harmony generator with 3D color space visualization, achieving 250K+ downloads and 4.8/5 star
rating on ProductHunt
Optimized WebGL rendering achieving 60fps on mid-range devices by implementing instance rendering and shader
optimization, reducing GPU memory usage by 52%
AccessViz - Accessibility Audit Dashboard | Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Playwright, D3.js 2020 - 2021
Created open-source WCAG compliance monitoring tool with 2.1K GitHub stars, used by 50+ organizations for
automated accessibility testing
Engineered scanning engine to audit 5000+ pages daily by implementing headless browser pooling, reducing scan time by
71% and server costs by $4K/month
EXTRACURRICULAR
React Europe Conference | Technical Speaker & Program Committee Member 2019 - Present
Delivered 4 keynote talks on advanced React patterns and performance optimization to 3000+ attendees across multiple
years
Curated technical agenda for 2023 conference, selecting 35 talks from 180+ submissions resulting in 92% attendee
satisfaction score
Frontend Masters Community | Core Maintainer & Mentor 2017 - Present
Contributed 120+ hours of mentoring to junior frontend engineers through 1-on-1 sessions and code reviews, 8 mentees
progressed to senior roles
Maintained open-source UI component library with 15K GitHub stars, triaging 200+ issues annually and merging 60+
community contributions
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – JavaScript (ES6+), TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3/SCSS, GraphQL, SQL
Technologies – React, Next.js, Vue.js, Webpack, Vite, Redux, MobX, Jest, Cypress, Playwright, WebGL, Canvas API,
WebSockets, Service Workers
Tools – Git, Docker, GitHub, Figma, Chrome DevTools, Lighthouse, WebPageTest, Datadog, New Relic, Linear, Jira, Notion
name: Email
